title: festuca oreophila
intro: Festuca oreophila, also known as the mountain fescue, is a species of grass that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of this plant have been used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction and inflammation relief. The health benefits associated with Festuca oreophila include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
